## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New channel adapter
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (the `globals.css` side-effect warning is expected)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Matched the surrounding code style; updated any header comment whose behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `./data/` contents committed
- [ ] Per-project state preserved (no global channel/campaign state reintroduced)
- [ ] For autonomous ad changes: total cap, daily cap, and kill switch still enforced
